useragent: typobot
Dissallow: /typo-one/
Disalow: /typo-two/
Dissalow: /typo-three/
Diasllow: /typo-four/
Disallaw: /typo-five/

user agent: secondbot
Dissallow: /typo-six/

site-map: https://example.com/typo-sitemap.xml

# google matches keys by case-insensitive PREFIX, so these also count
# as user-agent / disallow / allow respectively:
user-agents-are-fun: prefixbot
Disallowing: /prefix-key-disallow/
Allowed: /prefix-key-disallow/but-allowed
